name: Suzuden Corporation
summary: Suzuden Corporation distributes mechanical and electronic parts in Japan. The company trades in air cylinders, breakers, bridges, cables, conduit pipes, connectors, contactors, fans, input devices, lights and lamps, and magnets, as well as monitors, semiconductors, sensors, servomotors, single board computers, transducers, transformers, trimmers, UPS, valves, wires, and various other products. It also offers factory automation equipment and parts. The company was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
